_comment: Committed query set for the self-benchmarking suite. Each query carries the modules we expect to see in the top retrieval hits — used by the regression test to verify retrieval quality on top of raw token reduction. Keep the shape small; CI runs this on every PR.

queries.question: How does authentication work in this codebase?
What are the main API endpoints?
Explain the billing flow from a user perspective.
How are users stored in the database?
How does JWT signature verification work?
What happens when a Stripe webhook fires?
How do I create a new user?
What database does this project use?
How are invoices sent to users?

learning_seed._comment: Queries used to seed the memory log before Phase 2 (learning uplift). Heavier on auth + billing than on users, to create a realistic cooccurrence signal the reranker can exploit.
history: How does the JWT token get signed?
Can a user log in with an expired token?
How do I charge a customer?
What happens if a Stripe charge fails?
How do I issue a partial refund?
How does the login endpoint work?
How is a user session revoked?
